parties.name: THIVAWONGSAKAL, JIRA 1135 ELLIS STREET #A209 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-08-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of GENDER only.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Petitioner: Jira Thivawongsakal, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of GENDER were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of GENDER from MALE to FEMALE.
Decree signed in open court.
